steps.title: Read two points from the line of best fit and calculate slope
steps.content:
The line passes through approximately (0, 175) and (10, 575).

$$\text{slope} = \frac{575 - 175}{10 - 0} = \frac{400}{10} = 40 \text{ °F per hour}$$

steps.title: Interpret the slope
steps.content: The slope is positive (the line rises from left to right), so temperature increases. The magnitude is 40°F per hour. A constant increase of 40°F per hour matches choice B — B is correct.
